tracks.meaning: a thing that is perceptible by the senses or the mind; a material item or entity
a discrete unit of data or code in object-oriented programming that combines properties and methods
the noun or noun phrase in a sentence that receives the action of the verb
to express disapproval or disagreement with something
to raise a formal protest or legal challenge against a decision or evidence
a person or thing toward which feelings or desires are directed
a discrete celestial body or entity being observed or studied
a subject or focus of artistic representation or creation
a person regarded with a particular feeling or in a particular way
a specific goal, aim, or target that an organization or individual seeks to achieve
